transcript.message: Hello, it's wonderful to connect with you today. My name is Rohan, and I'm a recruiter with a growing fintech company. I came across your profile and was impressed with your experience in AI engineering, so I'm excited to learn more about your background. Can you start by telling me a bit about your current role and what you've been working on lately?

I'm Vikram Verma, nice to connect with you too, Rohan. I'm currently working as a Full Stack Developer at Globex Inc, where I've been handling a mix of backend and frontend tasks. Lately, I've been working on building data pipelines using Snowflake and BigQuery, and also implementing recommendation systems for our e-commerce platform.

That's fascinating, Vikram, it sounds like you've had a chance to work on some interesting projects, especially with the recommendation systems. I'm curious to know what sparked your interest in exploring new opportunities, and specifically, what drew you to this Senior AI Engineer role in the fintech domain that I'm currently recruiting for?

I've been in my current role for about 4 years now, and while I've enjoyed the challenges and opportunities that come with it, I'm looking to expand my skill set and take on new challenges that will allow me to grow professionally. The fintech domain is an area that I'm interested in, and I think my experience with data pipelines and recommendation systems could be valuable in this space.

It's great to hear that you're looking to expand your skill set and take on new challenges, Vikram. Given your interest in the fintech domain and the Senior AI Engineer role, I'd like to discuss the compensation aspect - what are your expectations in terms of salary for a position like this?

My salary expectation for a Senior AI Engineer role in the fintech domain is ₹0L per annum. I'm open to discussing the overall compensation package, considering factors such as benefits, bonuses, and opportunities for growth within the company. I believe my skills and experience, including my work with Snowflake, BigQuery, and recommendation systems, would be a good fit for this role.

That's helpful to know, Vikram, and I appreciate your openness about your expectations. Now, I'd like to touch base on your current situation - if you were to move forward with this opportunity, what's your notice period like at Globex Inc, and when would you be available to join our team in either Pune or Noida?

My notice period at Globex Inc is 60 days, so if I were to join your team, I'd be available to start after completing that period. However, I'd like to discuss the location further - I'm currently based in Hyderabad, so relocating to either Pune or Noida would require some consideration. Could you tell me more about the team and the work environment in both locations?

I completely understand your concerns about relocation, Vikram, and I'm happy to provide more information about our teams in Pune and Noida. Before I do that, I'd like to ask, what specific aspects of the team or work environment are you most curious about, so I can address those directly and give you a better sense of what to expect?

I'm interested in knowing more about the team's dynamics, the technology stack they're using, and the typical projects they work on. Additionally, I'd like to know about the company culture, opportunities for growth, and how the team contributes to the overall organization. This information will help me get a better understanding of whether this role would be a good fit for me.

Vikram, it was an absolute pleasure speaking with you today, and I appreciate the time you took to share your thoughts and experiences with me. I'm confident that your skills and passion for AI engineering would be a great fit for our team, and I'm excited to move forward with the next steps. I'll be in touch with you within the next few days to discuss the details further and answer any additional questions you may have. In the meantime, I wish you all the best in your career endeavors, and I look forward to connecting with you soon. Thank you again, Vikram!

It was great speaking with you too, Rohan, and I appreciate the time you took to discuss the opportunity with me. I'm looking forward to hearing from you soon and learning more about the next steps. Thank you again for your time and consideration, and I wish you all the best in finding the right candidate for the role. Have a great day!
